creator: rigoletto@freebsd.org
text:
Created attachment 192035
Updating to version 2.3.1.

Attached a patch to:

- update to version 2.3.1
- add new dependencies
- switch to DISTVERSION
- switch to using upstream published tarball instead of the automatic generated ones[1]
- minors

[1] https://marc.info/?l=openbsd-ports&m=151973450514279&w=2

Thanks.
